title: Trapped in a Vehicle by Wildfire
immediate_steps: Park the vehicle in an area clear of heavy vegetation (bare dirt or rocks is best)
Close all windows and vents, turn off the AC to prevent drawing in smoke
Leave headlights and hazard lights on
Get below the window level and cover yourself with a wool blanket or jacket (NOT synthetic materials which melt)
Wait for the fire front to pass over the vehicle
avoid: Do not drive blindly through heavy smoke
Do not abandon the vehicle for a body of water unless it is extremely large and deep (water boils and heat radiates)
